subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One of the horizons, despite the tribulations that have befallen and the calamities that have descended, summoneth all the peoples of the world unto God, glorified be His majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مظلوم آفاق مع بلایای وارده و رزایای نازله جمیع اهل عالم را بحق جل جلاله دعوت
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
